title: Reasoning, Planning, Decomposition, and Verification · Prompt Lens: Plan Mode
summary: Prompt a difficult migration without exposing or demanding hidden reasoning. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt plan mode increment in a plan-execute-verify task contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use planning before implementation when scope, dependencies, or user choices are materially uncertain.
Request concise conclusions, evidence, and checks rather than hidden chain-of-thought disclosure.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

# Cross-agent prompt portfolio
# Add tested contracts below. Keep shared intent separate from Claude and Codex adaptations.

steps.title: Predict Plan Mode
steps.instruction:
theory case — Use a changed theory case for prompt reasoning planning that tests this competency: defend the module contract. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Plan Mode into observable performance evidence.
